violations.description: General employee cleanliness. — --Observed a dry hand sink at 1:00 pm. Observed no hand washing before gloving.
Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. -Ensure date marking occurs.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Clean the wlak in cooler fan cover.--Deep clean all reach in units freezers, fridges, cold hold units.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required.
Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Deep clean floors and walls in the kitchen.
General premises. — --Clean/degrease the ramp at the back door.
Backflow prevention, back siphonage (3 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (2 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
